LanguageData.VME_PermitHonorCost_Doubled.description: Every call for aid is a heavy toll, a demand of honor twice the usual rate. Such is the price of urgency, a cost only to be borne when the need is direst.
LanguageData.VME_PermitHonorCost_Doubled.label: doubled
LanguageData.VME_PermitHonorCost_Halved.description: The honored have the privilege of calling upon their allies more frequently, their requests for aid met with a nod and a half a cost, easing the burden of leadership.
LanguageData.VME_PermitHonorCost_Halved.label: halved
